caption: In a brightly lit room, two people are gathered around a large, open atlas displaying a map of Africa. One person, wearing a pink shirt, uses a red pointer to indicate a specific area on the map, while another person, dressed in a tan garment, points with their finger toward a different region. The camera angle is from behind a child's head, whose dark hair is visible in the foreground. The people are interacting with the map, shifting their focus slightly as they discuss the geography. Across the bottom of the scene, white subtitles appear, reading: "Tomorrow, or after tomorrow, our country will be at peace." The scene remains largely static across the sequence, with only subtle movements of the hands and the pointer as they gesture toward the colorful map.
